name: kptournir
description: Full-stack: Node.js server + Vite React TS frontend

scripts.bump:patch: npm version patch -m "chore: bump root to %s"
scripts.bump:minor: npm version minor -m "chore: bump root to %s"
scripts.bump:major: npm version major -m "chore: bump root to %s"
scripts.bump:front:patch: npm --prefix frontend version patch -m "chore(frontend): bump to %s"
scripts.bump:front:minor: npm --prefix frontend version minor -m "chore(frontend): bump to %s"
scripts.bump:front:major: npm --prefix frontend version major -m "chore(frontend): bump to %s"
